column1: Denis is _____ but Boris is much _____ . (tall, tall)
The _____ Saturday in March was the _____ of March. (one, four)
The last _____ of the book were sold. (copy)
A penguin is a large black and white bird. It cannot fly but it uses _____ wings for swimming. (it)
Have a look! The penguin is enjoying _____ . (it)
